name: Santos de Cartier
description:
The Santos de Cartier holds a unique place in horological history — it was the first wristwatch ever created for everyday wear, designed in 1904 for aviation pioneer Alberto Santos-Dumont. Over a century later, its square case, exposed screws, and Roman numeral dial remain as revolutionary as ever.

The silver dial variant is the most versatile Santos expression. The interplay between the polished square case, the brushed bracelet links, and the silver dial catches light from every angle. This is not just a watch — it is Cartier's founding statement. Worn by athletes, artists, and icons for 120 years.
descriptionShort: The original wristwatch. Square case, Roman numerals, iconic exposed screws — pure Cartier heritage.
keyPoints: The world's first everyday wristwatch, born 1904
Square case with iconic exposed screws
Silver sunray-brushed dial with Roman numerals
Integrated steel bracelet with quick-release system
Equally at home with suits and streetwear
120 years of continuous production — a living legend

specs.bracelet: Integrated steel, alternating polished and brushed links
